General.Name: Roma Group Ltd
General.Description: Langu Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides valuation and advisory services in Hong Kong. It operates through Valuation and Advisory Services; Financing Services; Securities Broking, Placing and Underwriting, and Investment Advisory and Asset Management Services; and Other segments. The company offers asset appraisal and asset advisory services, including real estate and fixed asset appraisal, mineral property appraisal, business and intangible asset valuation, and financial instrument valuation and advisory services, as well as environmental, social, and governance reporting services. It also provides provide personal loans, commercial loans, and mortgage loans to individuals and corporations; placing and underwriting and investment advisory and asset management services; securities broking and trading of securities services to investors, equity, and debt securities placing and underwriting services to listed companies; and investment advisory and asset management services to professional investors. In addition, the company offers business and intangible asset valuation, biological assets, purchase price allocation, machineries and equipment, and work of art valuation services; corporate and risk advisory services, such as auction, property agency, land advisory, credit and risk evaluation, internal control advisory, and background search and due diligence; and natural resources valuation and technical advisory services. Further, it is involved in the provision of consultancy, marketing and event organization, and credit report services; and property investment activities. The company was formerly known as Roma (meta) Group Limited and changed its name to Langu Company Limited in January 2026. Langu Company Limited was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Harcourt House, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
